note: Exact CVE id — BM25's strength. Both keyword and hybrid should nail it.
Exact asset/repo name — lexical match across all findings on that asset.
Topic query with some lexical overlap ('exposed'); both should do well.

query: can someone impersonate us on our internal messaging platform
note: Pure paraphrase of the Slack webhook finding — zero token overlap, so keyword misses entirely. Semantic should catch it.

query: unsanitized user input lets an attacker read our database
note: Paraphrase of the SQL injection finding (no shared content words). Keyword miss, semantic hit.

query: outdated java logging component being actively exploited
note: Keyword matches decoys ('outdated'->TR-004, 'exploited'->TR-001); semantic should rank the real Log4Shell finding first, so hybrid MRR beats keyword.
